emergent_themes.description: Delivery anxiety and preference for minimal social interaction during delivery process
Mental health needs overriding financial constraints in delivery decisions
Free student subscriptions as primary driver of platform switching behavior

coding_summary: P028 reveals a complex relationship with delivery driven by financial constraints, social anxiety, and mental health needs. Key findings include: (1) Strong emotional triggers for ordering (stress, tiredness, reward after difficult weeks), (2) Significant delivery anxiety around social interaction and logistics, (3) Financial constraints creating careful budget monitoring but mental health needs overriding cost concerns, (4) Subscription benefits driving complete platform loyalty switch from Just Eat to Deliveroo, (5) Peer influence in subscription discovery and platform adoption. The participant demonstrates how delivery serves as accessible emotional regulation tool despite financial limitations.
